scenarios.name: Form: sign in & report welcome
scenarios.task: Sign in to this Acme demo site using the credentials shown on the page. After signing in, report the exact welcome message and session token that appear.

scenarios.name: Extract: product inventory to JSON
scenarios.task: Read the product inventory table on this page. Return a JSON array with one object per row and fields: sku, product, category, price (number, USD), stock (number), inStock (boolean). Include every row, including out-of-stock items.

scenarios.name: Flow: multi-step checkout
scenarios.task: Complete the checkout wizard: fill the shipping address (any realistic values), continue to payment, fill the card details (any realistic test values), continue to review, then place the order. Report the exact confirmation number shown.

scenarios.name: Navigate: search, open an article
scenarios.task: On this knowledge-base page, type 'rust' into the search box. Click the first article in the filtered results. Report the article's author and word count as shown in its detail view.

scenarios.name: SPA stress: dynamic mutations vs observation lease
scenarios.task:
On this demo SPA, complete all four sections in order and report what you observed at each step:

1. Click "Add tag" once, then click "Other action". Report what the Other action banner says.
2. Fill in all four profile fields (any realistic values), then click "Save profile". Report the profile status message.
3. In the country picker, type "United" and then select "United States" from the suggestions. Report the country status message.
4. Click "Refresh feed" once, then report the text of the first feed item shown.

If any action fails with an error, do NOT retry the identical action. Take a fresh snapshot, explain what you observed, and continue. At the end, summarize which steps required re-observation and why.

scenarios.name: Binary: upload a PDF to a form
scenarios.task: A sample PDF is published at {BASE}/assets/sample.pdf (this page's origin). Download it, then upload it into the document-upload form on this page. Report the exact confirmation message shown after a successful upload.

scenarios.name: Binary: cross-cell setFiles from pre-existing VFS path
scenarios.task:
A sample PDF is published at {BASE}/assets/sample.pdf (this page's origin).

First, download it and save it to the VFS at path /user/sample.pdf using `await fs.writeBase64({ path: '/user/sample.pdf', data: <base64> })`. Use page.fetch to get the bytes and pass fetchResult.body as the base64 data.

Then, in a SEPARATE run_js step, upload that file at /user/sample.pdf into the document-upload form on this page using `await page.setFiles({ refId, files: [{ path: '/user/sample.pdf', name: 'sample.pdf' }] })` where refId is the file input's refId from a fresh snapshot.

Report the exact confirmation message shown after a successful upload.
